text.message: re you gonna be more calm this game
I believe I was perfectly calm! You noticed blue's behavior in the previous scuffle, did you not?
He did admit to trying to kingmake and soloed me the whole game despite falling behind for a good portion, you disagree?
I dont want any trouble sir
No trouble at all, I promise I am not aggressive
If one were to observe the chat from a neutral third party perspective, I think you may see that I was very rational
But yes I will not be aggressive
Interesting table talk green, just now occurring to me, I applaud the effort!
Coordy 8s over sheep pile, we shall see!
Considering you don't make brick I thought you might fancy this one
Bro got deported from the game
